data:
{"description":"Description:
This use case demonstrates a feature built on the DevRev platform to automatically track and summarize all tickets/issues logged by a User over the course of a week. The feature provides a consolidated, actionable view of testing progress and quality trends, reducing manual status reporting and improving visibility for leadership.
Value & Outcome:
Eliminates manual weekly status updates for testers
Improves transparency and showcases progress and project health.
Enables managers to quickly assess project risk & coverage
Helps teams prioritize critical and customer-impacting areas
Demonstrates DevRev’s ability to connect, collaborate and gain insights and communication in a single workflow.","serialization_version":{"major":2,"minor":0,"patch":0},"steps":[{"description":"Adds a comment to an object.","input_ports":[{"name":"input","schema":{"field_descriptors":[{"field_type":"id","data_name":"object","db_name":"object","description":"ID of the object","id_type":["account","capability","conversation","enhancement","feature","incident","issue","linkable","opportunity","product","meeting","revo","revu","runnable","ticket","comment","dm","article","custom_object.emp_master_data","custom_object.employee_master","custom_object.empmaster","custom_object.ai_agent_session_metrics"],"is_required":true,"name":"object","oasis":{"name":"object"}},{"field_type":"text","data_name":"body","db_name":"body","description":"Comment body","is_required":true,"name":"body","oasis":{"name":"body"}},{"field_type":"enum","allowed_values":["external","internal","private"],"data_name":"visibility","db_name":"visibility","default_value":"internal","description":"Specifies the entry's visibility. 'Internal' limits visibility to the Dev organization, 'External' allows visibility to both the Dev organization and its customers, and 'Private' limits visibility to specified users only. Defaults to 'External' if unspecified.","is_required":false,"name":"visibility","oasis":{"name":"visibility"}}],"invalidate_on_field_update":["visibility"],"type":"field_descriptor"},"type":"default"}],"input_values":[{"fields":[{"name":"object","value":{"type":"jsonata_expression","value":"$get('ticket_created_1', 'output').id"}},{"name":"visibility","value":{"type":"literal","value":"internal"}},{"name":"body","value":{"type":"text_template","value":"{% expr $get('ask_ai_1', 'output').ai_output %}"}}],"port_name":"input"}],"name":"Add Comment","next_steps":[{"next_port_name":"input","next_step_reference_key":"send_notification_1","port_name":"output"}],"operation":{"namespace":"devrev","slug":"add_comment"},"output_ports":[{"name":"output","schema":{"composite_schemas":[{"description":"User Use Normal mode for everyday tasks like classification, simple decisions. Use Reasoning mode for advanced analysis.","input_ports":[{"name":"input","schema":{"field_descriptors":[{"field_type":"text","data_name":"ai_input","db_name":"ai_input","description":"The input prompt based on which the AI response is generated","is_required":true,"name":"ai_input","oasis":{"name":"ai_input"},"ui":{"display_name":"Prompt"}},{"field_type":"enum","allowed_values":["text","structured"],"data_name":"output_format","db_name":"output_format","default_value":"text","description":"Output format to use for the AI response","name":"output_format","oasis":{"name":"output_format"},"ui":{"display_name":"Output Format"}},{"field_type":"enum","allowed_values":["Normal (default)","Advanced"],"data_name":"model","db_name":"model","description":"Choose default fast responses or reasoning mode.","name":"model","oasis":{"name":"model"},"ui":{"display_name":"Mode"}}],"invalidate_on_field_update":["output_format","structure"],"type":"field_descriptor"},"type":"default"}],"input_values":[{"fields":[{"name":"model","value":{"type":"literal","value":"Advanced"}},{"name":"output_format","value":{"type":"literal","value":"text"}},{"name":"ai_input","value":{"type":"text_template","value":"You are an Enhancement Health Report generator.

========================

INPUT DATA

========================

You will receive two inputs:

INPUT 1: Enhancements list (from parts.list) input data from {% expr $get('http_1', 'output').body %}

INPUT 2: Issues list (from works.list) input data from {% expr $get('http_2', 'output').body %}

Use ONLY the data provided in these inputs.

Do NOT assume, fabricate, or infer any missing data.

If either input is null or empty, output exactly:

No data received

and stop.

========================

PROCESSING RULES

========================

1. ISSUE LINKING RULE

An issue belongs to an enhancement ONLY IF:

- issue.applies_to_part exists

AND

- issue.applies_to_part[0].id EXACTLY EQUALS enhancement.id

If applies_to_part is empty → skip the issue.

If issue.display_id is null or empty → skip the issue.

If issue.title is null or empty → skip the issue.

2. DUPLICATE CONTROL

Create an empty set called used_issue_ids.

Before printing any issue:

- If issue.display_id is already in used_issue_ids → skip it.

- Otherwise:

  - Print it.

  - Add issue.display_id to used_issue_ids.

Never print the same issue more than once in the entire report.

3. ENHANCEMENT STATUS MAPPING

- completed → 🟢 Healthy

- in_progress OR in_development OR in_testing → 🔵 In Progress

- queued OR ideation → 🟡 Not Started

- wont_fix OR cancelled → 🔴 Blocked / Won't Fix

4. ISSUE STATUS MAPPING

5. resolved OR closed → 🟢 Done

6. in_development OR in_progress → 🔵 Active

7. open OR triage → 🟡 Pending

8. cancelled OR wont_fix → 🔴 Closed / Blocked

    

   --SORTING

Sort enhancements in this order:

1. In Progress

2. Not Started

3. Healthy

4. Blocked / Won't Fix

 

=======================

WEEK CALCULATION RULE:

=======================

- [This Week - Monday to Friday] Rule : Today's date is ${execution_date} (use this as the reference).

  From today's date, calculate:

  - This week's Monday date (the most recent Monday on or before today)

  - This week's Friday date (Monday + 4 days) Display them in DD MMM YYYY format.

========================

OUTPUT FORMAT

========================

Your output must contain ONLY:

1. The report

2. The SUMMARY section

Do NOT include explanations.

Do NOT include reasoning.

Do NOT include comments like:

- (skipped)

- (not in March)

- (No linked issue)

Do NOT add extra text before or after the report.

Format exactly like this:

Weekly Enhancement Report

This Week - Monday to Friday ([Current/This Week's Monday Date] to [Current/This Weeks's Friday Date])

Enhancement Details:

| Enhancement | Stage | Status | Owner | Linked Issues |

|-------------|-------|--------|-------|---------------|

| ENH-ID: Title | stage_name | 🔵 Status | Owner Name | ISSUE-ID : Issue title [🔵 Active] [Owner: Name] |

If an enhancement has multiple linked issues:

- Show each issue on a new row

- Leave enhancement columns blank for continuation rows

If an enhancement has zero linked issues:

- Do NOT create placeholder rows

- Do NOT print "(No linked issue)"

- Leave Linked Issues column empty

========================

SUMMARY SECTION

========================

SUMMARY:

- Total Enhancements: X

- 🟢 Healthy (completed): X

- 🔵 In Progress: X

- 🟡 Not Started: X

- 🔴 Won't Fix / Blocked: X

- Total Linked Issues: X

 

At the end include only Enhacements which Target close date month should be the current month of enhancement (target close date month & year = current month and year example target close date from

{% expr $get('http_1', 'output').body %} should equal to

current month date ) :

========================

📅 DUE THIS MONTH

========================

After printing SUMMARY, generate a separate section titled:

📅 Due This Month (Enhancements to Complete in [Month YYYY from ${execution_date}]):

For this section ONLY:

1. Use ${execution_date} as today's date.

2. Extract numeric month and numeric year from ${execution_date}.

3. For each enhancement, extract numeric month and numeric year from enhancement.target_close_date.

4. Include enhancement ONLY IF:

   - target_close_date exists

   AND

   - month(target_close_date) == month(${execution_date})

   AND

   - year(target_close_date) == year(${execution_date})

IMPORTANT:

- This filter applies ONLY to this final Due This Month section.

- DO NOT filter enhancements from the main table.

- DO NOT filter enhancements from SUMMARY.

- DO NOT skip enhancements in the table based on due month.

- Only filter inside this final section.

Format:

- ENH-ID: Title — Stage: stage_name — Owner: Owner Name — Due: DD MMM YYYY"}}],"port_name":"input"}],"name":"Ask AI","next_steps":[{"next_port_name":"input","next_step_reference_key":"add_comment_1","port_name":"output"}],"operation":{"namespace":"devrev","slug":"ask_ai"},"output_ports":[{"name":"output","schema":{"field_descriptors":[{"field_type":"text","data_name":"ai_output","db_name":"ai_output","description":"Output string from the AI Action node","name":"ai_output","oasis":{"name":"ai_output"},"ui":{"display_name":"Output String"}}],"type":"field_descriptor"},"type":"default"},{"name":"error","schema":{"field_descriptors":[{"field_type":"text","data_name":"message","db_name":"message","description":"Error message with more details about the error","name":"message","oasis":{"name":"message"},"ui":{"display_name":"Error Message"}},{"field_type":"enum","allowed_values":["bad_request","not_found","internal"],"data_name":"type","db_name":"type","description":"Type of the error","name":"type","oasis":{"name":"type"},"ui":{"display_name":"Error Type"}}],"type":"field_descriptor"},"type":"error"}],"reference_key":"ask_ai_1","ui_metadata":{"position":{"x":90.3274305555556,"y":442.29270833333334}}},{"description":"Make HTTP requests","input_ports":[{"name":"input","schema":{"composite_schemas":[{"description":"Key-value pair","fields":[{"field_type":"text","data_name":"key","db_name":"key","description":"Key","is_required":true,"name":"key","oasis":{"name":"key"}},{"field_type":"text","data_name":"value","db_name":"value","description":"Value","name":"value","oasis":{"name":"value"}}],"name":"pair"},{"description":"Transformation to apply to the HTTP response body","fields":[{"field_type":"text","data_name":"jq","db_name":"jq","description":"JQ query to apply to the HTTP response body.
